title: potentilla × balatonensis
intro: Potentilla × balatonensis, also known as Balaton cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species within the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Potentilla aurea and Potentilla fruticosa. This plant contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Potentilla × balatonensis include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which can help protect against oxidative stress, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. In herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, often used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory conditions.
